name: Four Chips Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heavy Dutch oven over low heat.
2. Stir in the milk and condensed milk until melted.
3. Add all the chocolate chips, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the marshmallow cream, vanilla, and almond extracts.
5. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
6. Pour the mixture into a buttered 15 x 10 x 1-inch jellyroll pan and spread evenly.
7. Chill thoroughly and cut into squares.
8. Store in the refrigerator.
